tools.name: whoami
tools.title: Who am I
tools.description: Return the signed-in Utsav user's id, email, full name, and global roles.

tools.name: current_permissions
tools.title: Current permissions
tools.description: Return the set of Utsav actions the signed-in user can perform globally and on any events they staff.

tools.name: current_organizations
tools.title: My organizations
tools.description: List organizations the signed-in user is a member of.

tools.name: list_users
tools.title: List users
tools.description: Search Utsav users by name/email. Admin-only.

tools.name: get_user
tools.title: Get user
tools.description: Fetch a user's profile and roles. Callers may fetch themselves; admins may fetch anyone.

tools.name: create_user
tools.title: Create user
tools.description: Utsav uses email/Google sign-up flows for account creation; MCP does not create user accounts. Use invite_member to add existing users to organizations.

tools.name: update_user
tools.title: Update user profile
tools.description: Update the signed-in user's own profile. Cannot change email or roles here.

tools.name: deactivate_user
tools.title: Deactivate user
tools.description: Revoke ALL non-expired roles for a user, effectively removing app access. Admin-only. Does not delete the account.

tools.name: assign_role
tools.title: Assign role
tools.description: Grant a role to a user. Admin-only for global/admin/faculty; faculty or admin for organization/event scopes.

tools.name: revoke_role
tools.title: Revoke role
tools.description: Revoke a previously assigned role by its id. Admin-only for admin/faculty roles; faculty+admin otherwise.

tools.name: delegate_permission
tools.title: Delegate permission
tools.description: Time-boxed delegation of an event-scoped role to another user. Requires faculty/admin or being an existing coordinator of the event.

tools.name: list_organizations
tools.title: List organizations
tools.description: List Utsav organizations. Visible to all authenticated users.

tools.name: create_organization
tools.title: Create organization
tools.description: Create a new Utsav organization. Requires faculty or admin role (enforced by RLS).

tools.name: update_organization
tools.title: Update organization
tools.description: Update organization name/type/parent. Requires faculty or admin role.

tools.name: invite_member
tools.title: Add organization member
tools.description: Add an existing Utsav user to an organization. Requires being an org coordinator or admin (enforced by RLS).

tools.name: remove_member
tools.title: Remove organization member
tools.description: Remove a user from an organization. Users can remove themselves; coordinators/admins can remove anyone.

tools.name: list_events
tools.title: List events
tools.description: List Utsav events visible to the signed-in user. Filter by status, category, or a text query on title/description.

tools.name: get_event
tools.title: Get event
tools.description: Fetch a single Utsav event by id or slug. Access follows RLS.

tools.name: create_event
tools.title: Create event
tools.description: Create a new event draft. Alias of create_event_draft with a broader field set.

tools.name: create_event_draft
tools.title: Create event draft
tools.description: Create a new Utsav event as a draft owned by the signed-in user. Use `change_event_status` to submit for approval or publish.

tools.name: update_event
tools.title: Update event
tools.description: Update mutable event fields. Cannot change status; use publish_event/archive_event/cancel_event.

tools.name: duplicate_event
tools.title: Duplicate event
tools.description: Create a draft copy of an existing event. Registrations and teams are NOT copied.

tools.name: publish_event
tools.title: Publish event
tools.description: Move an event to 'published'. Requires description, start/end times, and either venue or meeting URL. Requires coordinator/faculty/admin.

tools.name: archive_event
tools.title: Archive event
tools.description: Move an event to 'archived'. Requires coordinator/faculty/admin.

tools.name: cancel_event
tools.title: Cancel event
tools.description: Move an event to 'cancelled'. Requires coordinator/faculty/admin.

tools.name: delete_event
tools.title: Delete event
tools.description: Permanently delete an event and all its registrations and teams. Faculty/admin only (enforced by RLS).

tools.name: change_event_status
tools.title: Change event status
tools.description: Move an Utsav event through its lifecycle (draft → pending_approval → published, cancel, complete, archive). Server enforces role and transition rules.

tools.name: register_event
tools.title: Register for event
tools.description: Register the signed-in user for an event. Automatically waitlists when capacity is reached.

tools.name: unregister_event
tools.title: Unregister from event
tools.description: Cancel the signed-in user's registration for an event.

tools.name: list_registrations
tools.title: List event registrations
tools.description: List registrations for an event. Requires check-in or manage-teams permission (organizer/coordinator/volunteer/faculty/admin).

tools.name: list_my_registrations
tools.title: List my registrations
tools.description: List the signed-in user's event registrations, including team and status.

tools.name: approve_registration
tools.title: Approve registration
tools.description: Move a registration to 'registered' status (used to promote from waitlist). Requires manage-teams permission.

tools.name: reject_registration
tools.title: Reject registration
tools.description: Cancel a registration (staff action). Requires manage-teams permission.

tools.name: create_team
tools.title: Create team
tools.description: Create a team for an event; the caller becomes the leader and first member.

tools.name: join_team
tools.title: Join team
tools.description: Join a team using its invite code. The caller becomes an active member.

tools.name: invite_team_member
tools.title: Invite team member
tools.description: Add an existing Utsav user directly to a team as an active member. Leader or event staff only.

tools.name: remove_team_member
tools.title: Remove team member
tools.description: Remove a member from a team. Leader or event staff only.

tools.name: transfer_leader
tools.title: Transfer team leader
tools.description: Transfer team leadership to another active member. Only the current leader can do this.

tools.name: generate_qr
tools.title: Generate check-in QR token
tools.description: Generate a signed, time-boxed QR token for a registration. Volunteers/organizers/coordinators or faculty/admin can generate; typically the registrant themselves gets one at event start.

tools.name: validate_qr
tools.title: Validate QR token
tools.description: Verify a QR token's signature and expiry WITHOUT recording a check-in.

tools.name: scan_qr
tools.title: Scan QR (check-in)
tools.description: Validate a QR token and mark the registration as checked-in. Requires check-in permission on the event.

tools.name: manual_checkin
tools.title: Manual check-in
tools.description: Manually check-in a registration without a QR. Requires check-in permission on the event.

tools.name: checkout
tools.title: Check-out attendee
tools.description: Mark an already-checked-in registration as complete (returns them to 'registered' with checked_in_at cleared). Requires check-in permission.

tools.name: attendance_report
tools.title: Attendance report
tools.description: Summary of registrations and check-ins for an event. Requires check-in or manage-teams permission.

tools.name: event_statistics
tools.title: Event statistics
tools.description: Registration, team, and check-in counts for a single event.

tools.name: attendance_statistics
tools.title: Attendance statistics
tools.description: Check-in totals across events. Optionally scoped to a single event.

tools.name: registration_statistics
tools.title: Registration statistics
tools.description: Aggregate registration counts, either global (admin/faculty only, RLS-enforced) or for a specific event.

tools.name: dashboard_metrics
tools.title: Dashboard metrics
tools.description: Signed-in user's dashboard totals: events I created, my registrations, my teams, and pending approvals visible to me.

tools.name: global_search
tools.title: Global search
tools.description: Search across events and organizations by keyword. Results are filtered by RLS to what the caller can see.

tools.name: audit_logs
tools.title: Audit logs
tools.description: Read audit log entries. Callers see their own actions; admins see all.

tools.name: permission_history
tools.title: Permission history
tools.description: Role and delegation grant/revoke history for a user. Admin, or the user themselves.

tools.name: event_history
tools.title: Event history
tools.description: Full audit trail of a single event: creation, updates, status changes, registrations, check-ins.

tools.name: upload_image
tools.title: Upload image
tools.description: Upload an image (event cover, org logo, avatar). (Not yet available — ships in Phase 4 (Media Management).)

tools.name: upload_video
tools.title: Upload video
tools.description: Upload a video asset. (Not yet available — ships in Phase 4 (Media Management).)

tools.name: upload_document
tools.title: Upload document
tools.description: Upload a document (rules, brochure, etc.). (Not yet available — ships in Phase 4 (Media Management).)

tools.name: delete_media
tools.title: Delete media
tools.description: Delete a media asset by id. (Not yet available — ships in Phase 4 (Media Management).)

tools.name: list_media
tools.title: List media
tools.description: List media assets for an event or organization. (Not yet available — ships in Phase 4 (Media Management).)

tools.name: export_excel
tools.title: Export Excel
tools.description: Export registrations/attendance to XLSX. (Not yet available — ships in Phase 6 (Reports).)

tools.name: export_csv
tools.title: Export CSV
tools.description: Export registrations/attendance to CSV. (Not yet available — ships in Phase 6 (Reports).)

tools.name: export_pdf
tools.title: Export PDF report
tools.description: Generate a PDF summary report. (Not yet available — ships in Phase 6 (Reports).)

tools.name: generate_certificate
tools.title: Generate certificate
tools.description: Issue a certificate for a checked-in attendee. (Not yet available — ships in Phase 7 (Certificates).)

tools.name: verify_certificate
tools.title: Verify certificate
tools.description: Verify a certificate by its public code. (Not yet available — ships in Phase 7 (Certificates).)

tools.name: download_certificate
tools.title: Download certificate
tools.description: Fetch a signed certificate download URL. (Not yet available — ships in Phase 7 (Certificates).)

tools.name: send_notification
tools.title: Send notification
tools.description: Send an immediate notification. (Not yet available — ships in Phase 7 (Notifications).)

tools.name: schedule_notification
tools.title: Schedule notification
tools.description: Schedule a notification for later delivery. (Not yet available — ships in Phase 7 (Notifications).)

tools.name: notification_history
tools.title: Notification history
tools.description: List notifications sent/scheduled. (Not yet available — ships in Phase 7 (Notifications).)
